creator: Spectral Galileo
executive_summary: Trump formally announced a US Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Sunday April 12 after US-Iran Islamabad talks collapsed (Vance walked out after 21 hours) — sending WTI crude +9% to $105.28. This full-universe 55-ticker run unveils three extraordinary new SaaS oversold setups: NOW (RSI=17.1, fwdPE=16.5 — the cheapest it has ever traded vs fundamentals), SNOW (RSI=16.8), and CRM (RSI=22.2), while the Fear & Greed Index collapsed to 12 (Extreme Fear) — historically one of the strongest contrarian accumulation signals. Top 8 picks for moderate risk: NOW/MSFT/CVX/GILD/XAU/NVDA/BTC/CRM with 87.5% historical accuracy from yesterday's run (CVX +14.6% standout).

macro_environment.summary: Hormuz blockade formally announced April 12 — new escalation beyond Saturday's failed talks. WTI crude +9% to $105.28. Gold -2% on rate cut delay fears. BTC -3% risk-off. F&G=12 (Extreme Fear) — historically the strongest contrarian buy zone. Q1 earnings season opens this week: JPM/GS/WFC/C (Apr 14), BAC/MS (Apr 15), NFLX/TSM/ASML (Apr 16). Enterprise SaaS sector in mass capitulation (-47% NOW, -37% CRM, -43% SNOW YTD). Strategy/Saylor signaling imminent BTC purchase. Central banks: 23 consecutive months net gold buying.

historical_accuracy.market_note: US equity markets closed Sat-Sun. Only crypto and commodities moved overnight via Hormuz blockade formal announcement.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Microsoft Corporation
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=39.5 near SMA200 support ($356) — textbook contrarian re-entry for the world's most dominant enterprise AI platform. fwdPE=19.7 is historically the cheapest MSFT has traded in years. Azure cloud 25%+ growth confirmed. 'Copilot Code Red' shows Nadella forcing enterprise AI monetization at scale. Goldman, BNP, Bernstein all maintain Buy. Earnings Apr 29 is the catalyst — Azure AI revenue disclosure will drive consensus upgrades. Avg analyst PT $587 vs $371 = 58% upside.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: ServiceNow
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=17.1 — the single most extreme oversold reading in our entire 55-ticker universe. fwdPE=16.5 is extraordinary for a platform growing revenue +20.7% YoY with 37.3% FCF margin ($4.95B FCF annually). This is a once-in-a-cycle dislocation: the stock trades cheaper than Microsoft on a forward earnings basis despite superior growth metrics. Earnings April 22 (10 days) with 4-consecutive-beat streak (+5% avg surprise). Dan Ives (Wedbush): 'ServiceNow selloff is overdone.' RSI mean-reversion from 17→35 alone implies $110+ price target.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Chevron
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: The Hormuz blockade is a structural supply shock, not a 1-day event. CVX was already oversold (RSI=34.9) at $164 before today's oil surge — it was priced for $80 oil. At $105 WTI, Chevron's FCF jumps from ~$12B/yr to $18-20B/yr. The stock will gap up Monday and still be cheap. Earnings Apr 25 will trigger an earnings power upgrade cycle. Permian production growth + elevated dividend yield provide downside protection. This is the clearest macro trade in the portfolio right now.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Gilead Sciences
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=54.5 fair entry with fwdPE=14.46 — one of the most defensively valued large-cap biotechs. Five consecutive EPS beats with earnings April 23 as the next catalyst. HIV/oncology pipeline has zero exposure to Hormuz/Iran geopolitical risk. At $115 it pays a 3.5% dividend yield while you wait for the rerating. The safest pick in the portfolio with the cleanest risk/reward for moderate investors wanting biotech exposure without speculative binary risk.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Gold (XAU/USD)
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: 23 consecutive months of central bank net buying — Poland +20t, China 16th month straight, total CB holdings now exceed US Treasuries for first time since 1996. Iran war adds geopolitical safe-haven bid on top of the secular de-dollarization trend. RSI 62.4 is healthy, not extended. Gold is -2% today on rate cut delay fears from oil-driven inflation — a short-term headwind to a structural bull. DCA: Tranche 1 at $4,700 now, Tranche 2 at $4,500, Tranche 3 at $4,350 support. Gabelli $6,000 target; Goldman $5,800.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: NVIDIA
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: fwdPE=16.97 on a company growing revenue 120%+ YoY with 55.6% profit margins — the most compelling GARP trade in large-cap tech. RSI=68.2 is approaching overbought (suboptimal entry today) but NVDA was +2.55% Friday while Nasdaq was red — institutional accumulation confirmed. DCA structure: 40% at $188 now, 60% on pullback to $170-175. Q1 FY27 earnings May 20 + Blackwell GPU ramp report = next catalyst. Analyst avg PT $268 vs $188 = 42% upside.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Bitcoin
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Fear & Greed = 12 (Extreme Fear) — the most powerful contrarian accumulation signal in crypto. Strategy/Saylor is signaling an imminent purchase. BTC spot ETF net inflows recovered strongly: +$471M (Apr 6), +$358M (Apr 9), +$240M (Apr 10) totaling +$816M net last week. Coinbase Premium flipped positive (US institutional buying). Hormuz risk-off is creating an entry opportunity, not a thesis change. DCA: 25% at $70K, 25% at $68K, 50% at $64K. Stop $60K.

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Salesforce
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=22.2 at 52-week lows. fwdPE=11.08 — the cheapest Salesforce has traded in a decade for a company with $41.5B revenue, $16.4B FCF, and 18% net margins. Data breach overhang creates near-term noise but doesn't impair enterprise platform value. Agentforce AI differentiation is real. BTIG Buy $255 PT (55% upside). DCA structure: Tranche 1 $165 (now, smaller size due to breach), Tranche 2 $155, Tranche 3 $143 stop zone. Previous DCA position was taken at $228 — we are re-entering at a materially better price.

watchlist.note: RSI=16.8 extreme oversold but fwdPE=49.9 elevated even post -56% crash. No near-term earnings (~May-June). Negative EV/EBITDA. Wait for $95-108 zone before DCA entry.

watchlist.name: Silver

watchlist.name: Crude Oil WTI

cross_sector_insights.implication: Enterprise SaaS is experiencing a once-in-a-cycle capitulation: NOW at RSI=17.1 and CRM at RSI=22.2 are pricing in terminal decline for companies that are actually growing 20%+ with 35%+ FCF margins. The Goldman Sachs software note created indiscriminate selling that has produced generational entry points. Energy stocks (CVX) are the clearest macro beneficiary of Hormuz. Earnings season Apr 22-29 is the catalyst wave.

Real F&G index = 12 (Extreme Fear) while synthetic model shows 65.4 — divergence confirms the contrarian signal is real. ETF flows remained positive throughout the Hormuz risk-off ($816M net last week). Saylor/Strategy signaling bid. This is historically a 6-12 month accumulation entry. BTC>ETH>SOL preference for moderate risk.

Gold is paradoxically dipping on Hormuz (oil inflation → rate cut delay → gold headwind via rates). This creates a DCA opportunity into the structural bull: CB buying for 23 months straight, de-dollarization, geopolitical premium. Silver is too extended (+95% YTD). WTI is binary event risk — play through CVX equity instead.
